T0108.title: Bird-Killing Scam
T0108.definition: A fraud model targeting homebound individuals, using lures such as 'cashback for reviews' or 'high-paying part-time jobs' to trick victims into advancing their own funds or paying deposits.
T0108.description: After gaining trust with a small payout, the fraudster induces the victim to invest a large sum of principal, then refuses to return the money citing reasons like 'incomplete tasks.' This model relies heavily on social media platforms for lead generation and is one of the most prevalent types of telecom fraud. Victims often realize they have been scammed only after losing their entire savings.
